chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3601 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ تُخَالِطُوا وَ لاَ تُعَامِلُوا إِلاَّ مَنْ نَشَأَ فِي اَلْخَيْرِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3601 - Imam (as) said: "Do not associate with or conduct business except with those who have been raised in goodness."
